title: Ring of Shadows
description: A ring that darkens your view of the world...
body:
The Ring of Shadows is a late game item that allows you to enter a "shadow state".

When in this state you cannot interract with the world but you can watch. Extended use of this item could bring unwanted attention.

More info:

<details>
<summary>Info</summary>

The Ring of Shadows gives you the enshrouded effect when put in a ring slot.

Whilst enshrouded you cannot be seen by any non-enshrouded player and you cannot interact with the world.

But be careful if you are enshrouded too long you might start to get some downsides.

</details>



This mod was inspired by Lord of the Rings and the [Eye of Dreams](https://modrinth.com/mod/eye_of_dreams) fabric mod.
